query:
SELECT e.id, e.menuSlug, COUNT(p.id) as product_count 
FROM establishments e 
LEFT JOIN products p ON p.establishmentId = e.id 
WHERE e.menuSlug = 'burger-house-admin'
GROUP BY e.id;
